Sample_Description: The toy-boat example from demo_collection(), with three high-chord blades and a rounded-ogive spinner.

Sample_Description_i18n.en: The toy-boat example from demo_collection(), with three high-chord blades and a rounded-ogive spinner.
Sample_Description_i18n.pt-BR: Exemplo de barco de brinquedo de demo_collection(), com três pás de corda larga e spinner ogival arredondado.
Sample_Description_i18n.es: Ejemplo de barco de juguete de demo_collection(), con tres palas de gran cuerda y cono ojival redondeado.
Sample_Description_i18n.fr: Exemple de bateau jouet de demo_collection(), avec trois pales à grande corde et une ogive arrondie.
Sample_Description_i18n.de: Spielzeugbootbeispiel aus demo_collection() mit drei breiten Blättern und abgerundetem Ogiv-Spinner.
Sample_Description_i18n.ru: Пример игрушечной лодки из demo_collection() с тремя широкими лопастями и скруглённым оживальным коком.

Source.Reference: demo_boatpropblades(), including the final 180-degree flip, plus hub and ogive_spinner(8, 12)
Source.Adaptation_Notes: The final orientation reproduces translate([0,0,hublen]) rotate([180,0,0]) on the blade only; the hub and spinner are created afterward in the standard orientation. OpenSCAD hublen maps to Root_Length=25 mm, and Hub_Length is also set to 25 mm for a cleaner blend with the blade roots. Automatic profilepoints were converted to 48.
